title: oxalis mollis
intro: Oxalis mollis, also known as the soft-leaf woodsorrel, is a perennial plant species in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Oxalis mollis include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and diuretic. Oxalis mollis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, such as salves and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
